# sensitive

**Type Property**

The option to always redact interpolated values that contain sensitive information.

## Declaration

```swift
static var sensitive: OSLogPrivacy { get }
```

## Discussion

This option behaves identically to the [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OSLogPrivacy/private] option. When it redacts a value, the system displays a generic string in place of the value. If you want to correlate log messages that contain the same value, use the [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OSLogPrivacy/sensitive(mask:)] function to create the structure with the [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OSLogPrivacy/Mask/hash] mask.

## Getting the Privacy Options

- **auto**: The standard option to let the system determine whether to redact or display a value.
- **private**: The standard option to always redact the interpolated value.
- **public**: The standard option to always show the interpolated value.
